## Checklist

- [ ] `xcodegen generate` run if project structure changed
- [ ] Build passes (`xcodebuild ... build`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`xcodebuild ... test`)
- [ ] New domain behavior has unit tests (clock/services mocked)
- [ ] No business logic added inside SwiftUI views
- [ ] Shell scripts remain ShellCheck-clean (if touched)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (if user-facing)
